metadata.title: Holding Down Mid on Split with Calm Aim and Smart Peeks
metadata.description:
Check out this tense moment holding mid on Split. Smooth peeks and steady aim helped secure the round. What’s your go-to angle for tight holds?

Let me know your favorite clutch spot in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
metadata.cta: Let me know your favorite clutch spot in the comments!
